mission.title: grpc: Benchmarks seem broken
mission.description: Benchmarks seem broken. This issue affects 32+ users.

steps.title: Identify grpc troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your grpc setup:
gRPC library — check your language-specific package (e.g., pip show grpcio, npm ls @grpc/grpc-js)
Check your build output and test logs for errors related to this issue.

steps.title: Review grpc configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant grpc configuration:
**Issue description**
The benchmarks page does not seem to display any data for most graphs.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Benchmarks seem broken
steps.description:
Hopefully we will be able to revive the dashboard in Q4 2020. We don't plan to performance data snapshot as:
1. we'd like to focus on a long-term fix (= improve the underlying benchmarking framework) rather than manually generating performance data.
2. if you need to you can generate the data yourself by using run_performance_tests.py script (https://github.com/grpc/grpc/tree/master/tools/run_tests#performance-benchmarks-run_performance_testspy).
3. The data we publish in the dashboard are

See the source issue for community-verified solutions.

steps.title: Confirm Benchmarks seem broken is resolved
steps.description:

Test grpc to confirm the issue is resolved.
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.
